root_cause_summary: The previous q024 failure was caused by production retrieval/context mismatch plus stale Qdrant chunk metadata for multi-page chunks. The relevant GPT-3 Results evidence was not reliably presented to the model, and dense/Qdrant payloads could carry an outdated block_page_map that mapped every block in a multi-page chunk to page_start.

deterministic_changes.description: For paper-scoped experiment-design questions, retrieval now appends deterministic routing signals for models compared, task categories, scaling curves, evaluated datasets, evaluate the 8 models, wide range of datasets, group the datasets, training curves, and power-law trend.
Experiment-design context selection prioritizes Results/evaluation chunks containing GPT-3 experiment-design signals before generic Approach/Introduction material.
RRF preserves scores and ranks but uses the sparse/BM25 chunk payload as the fresh parsed-corpus metadata source when dense and sparse return the same chunk.
The API chunk loader backfills or corrects block_page_map from paper_blocks.jsonl so strict paper/page/block citation validation can use per-block pages for multi-page chunks.

verification.query: How are the target paper's experiments designed and evaluated?
